{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055023201A9BD7646CA79CB9EC"}"},"total":699},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596130389276033816","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好的一本原创同人小说，我觉得进了海贼这个辽阔大的世界就是要去冒险，而不是像其他同人书一样，天天冠冕堂皇的想着去推翻这个，推翻那个，纯属有病，起点和番茄的海贼同人文我基本看过，但是都有这种通病，与其说他们是同人文不如说是套着海贼的体系，写着和海贼截然不同的世界，我看那种我还不如去看修仙小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768615715,"group_id":"7573112893298723864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小萌新一枚，呜呜呜呜呜呜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4pZ00bLfI80zCwJjfzFKLA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1c823f0d26cb4253b87eddc7107c28af~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702383&x-signature=nzOqIpBabbl%2BE5XD7MckejkM7PA%3D","user_id":"62747584952","user_name":"一夜无语a"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"62747584952","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573112893298723864","book_info":{"abstract":"【魂穿，53年前，洛克斯时代】
穿越海贼王，却早了整整53年！
阴差阳错得到恶魔果实。
长得像石榴，肯定不是人人果实！
我以为天命在我！
一口下去……水母果实？(ΩДΩ)！
荣登“海陆空三废”之首？！
看着隔壁人人果实的老哥，我流下了同情的泪水。
算了，就算海贼王当不了，我也要成为海上最靓的仔！
我的水母海贼团，专治各种花里胡哨！٩(◕‿◕｡)۶","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6c32a3b6d106e18945f155119fbeacb9","author":"暗夜泡面侠","author_id":"","book_id":"7573112893298723864","book_name":"我要成为海贼王不是海蜇王啊混蛋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573116725953053208","read_count":"87305","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"996907"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"454","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,海贼,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36ab3da42795753e2b586f1c100ace9f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313823&x-signature=T%2BJy5ugxOWCmMsZmZRBOQYh0fgc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"631575674107788","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055023201A9BD7646CA79CB9EC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":181,"forwarded_co
